motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Immediate pointer feedback and surface arrival.

motion.name: popover-enter
motion.purpose: Spatially connects analytics to its trigger.

components.name: Counter Button
components.css: .ds-counter { min-width:4.5rem; height:2.75rem; display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:.5rem; padding:.625rem .75rem; border:1px solid oklch(84% .02 205); border-radius:.875rem; background:oklch(97% .012 205); color:oklch(28% .018 215); font:680 .9375rem/1 system-ui; font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums; cursor:pointer; transition:transform 130ms cubic-bezier(.23,1,.32,1), border-color 130ms ease, background-color 130ms ease; } .ds-counter svg { width:1.125rem; fill:none; stroke:oklch(48% .12 194); stroke-width:1.8; stroke-linecap:round; stroke-linejoin:round; } .ds-counter:active { transform:scale(.97); transition-duration:80ms; } .ds-counter:focus-visible { outline:3px solid oklch(59% .12 194 / .45); outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Analytics Popover
components.description: A solid, origin-aware seven-day analytics surface.
components.html:
SEVEN DAY ACTIVITY

Coffee

42 events

20% more than the previous seven days
components.css: .ds-popover { width:20rem; padding:1rem 1rem .875rem; border:1px solid oklch(84% .02 205); border-radius:1.125rem; background:oklch(98.5% .008 205); color:oklch(28% .018 215); box-shadow:0 1px 2px oklch(28% .018 215 / .08),0 14px 34px oklch(28% .018 215 / .14); font-family:system-ui; } .ds-popover h2,.ds-popover p { margin:0; } .ds-popover h2 { font-size:1rem; } .ds-popover strong { display:inline-block; margin-top:1rem; font-size:1.75rem; letter-spacing:-.035em; font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums; } .ds-popover p:last-child { margin-top:.375rem; color:oklch(52% .025 215); font-size:.75rem; } .ds-label { color:oklch(52% .025 215); font-size:.6875rem; font-weight:650; letter-spacing:.06em; }

components.name: Analytics Error
components.description: An inline retry state that never displaces the counter.
components.css: .ds-error { padding:.875rem; border:1px solid oklch(55% .17 25 / .3); border-radius:.75rem; background:oklch(55% .17 25 / .06); color:oklch(55% .17 25); font:.8125rem/1.4 system-ui; } .ds-error p { margin:0; } .ds-error button { margin-top:.625rem; padding:0; border:0; background:transparent; color:inherit; font:inherit; font-weight:700; text-decoration:underline; text-underline-offset:.2em; cursor:pointer; } .ds-error button:focus-visible { outline:3px solid currentColor; outline-offset:2px; }

narrative.overview: Wave Counter is a small, precise instrument embedded in someone else's interface. It is immediately understandable, satisfying to press, and visually self-contained without becoming a card or dashboard. Motion is responsive feedback plus spatial explanation.
keyCharacteristics: Restrained cool-neutral surfaces with one tidepool accent
Quiet ambient depth only on the overlapping popover
Complete pointer, touch, keyboard, and accessibility states

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: Tidepool is the only accent and appears only on action, focus, or data.

rules.name: The Stable Number Rule
rules.body: Every changing total uses tabular figures; reconciliation never shifts neighboring content.

rules.name: The Earned Depth Rule
rules.body: Only a surface that physically overlaps another surface receives an ambient shadow.

dos: Do keep the primary target at least 2.75rem (44px) high.
Do respond on pointer-down and reconcile optimistic totals without disabling the control.
Do provide textual total, comparison, UTC range, and daily counts beside every chart.
donts: Don't use casino counters, streak mechanics, confetti, badges, or other engagement-pressure patterns.
Don't use neon-on-dark developer-tool styling, purple gradients, glassmorphism, or decorative glow.
Don't use coffee-themed brown palettes that make the reusable library specific to one counter.
